_comment: SANDBOX mock responses for Claude API calls. Used when SANDBOX_MODE=true. Keyed by caller name (matches api_guard.py caller parameter). Each entry is the text the mock returns.

categorizer.MSG001: {"category": "Manufacturer-Principal", "urgency": 2, "draft_needed": true, "hold_flag": false, "sentiment_score": 0.7, "product_inquiry": false, "follow_up_needed": false, "summary": "Q2 pricing update from manufacturer"}
categorizer.MSG002: {"category": "Dealer-Customer", "urgency": 1, "draft_needed": true, "hold_flag": false, "sentiment_score": 0.8, "product_inquiry": true, "follow_up_needed": false, "summary": "Quote request for 4 units, Fargo job site"}
categorizer.MSG003: {"category": "Admin-Noise", "urgency": 5, "draft_needed": false, "hold_flag": false, "sentiment_score": 0.5, "product_inquiry": false, "follow_up_needed": false, "summary": "Industry newsletter — auto-filtered"}

draft_generator.MSG001:
Got it — thanks for the Q2 update. I'll get this in front of our dealers this week.

One question: are there any changes to the dealer tier structure, or is this a straight price adjustment?

Brad
draft_generator.MSG002:
Hey — I can get you pricing on those. Let me pull the current dealer cost on the Sandbox Widget Pro and get back to you by end of day.

Is this for a specific install, or are you building out your stock?

Brad

sent_log_writer.MSG001: Acknowledged Q2 pricing update from Sandbox Brand A. Asked about dealer tier structure changes.
sent_log_writer.MSG002: Responded to quote request from Sandbox Dealer for 4x Sandbox Widget Pro. Promised pricing by end of day. Asked about install vs. stock.

_failure_simulation._note: When MOCK_ZOHO_FAIL=true, run_pipeline.py raises a simulated auth failure before any API calls. Claude mock responses are never reached in failure mode.
